scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BE,FE,EL" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run dev:be" "npm run dev:fe" "npm run dev:el"
scripts.dev:be: cd backend && uv run uvicorn nidavellir.main:app --reload --port 7430
scripts.dev:el:
wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cd electron && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc && cmd.exe /c "taskkill /F /IM electron.exe 2>nul & C:\Users\colebienek\projects
idavellir\electron
ode_modules\electron\dist\electron.exe C:\Users\colebienek\projects
idavellir\electron\dist\main.js"
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../electron && npm install
scripts.test: cd backend && uv run pytest && cd ../frontend && npm test
